payload.body:
Agent implementation completed and the managed branch was pushed.

I’ll trace the existing crypto comparison and authorization tests first, then make the smallest fail-closed change and run the focused test suite plus relevant type/lint checks.The failure is isolated to the catch-all in token comparison. I’m checking the cleanest test seam now: one direct comparison test and one HTTP-level test with a deliberately failing `Crypto` service, so the 401 behavior is proven rather than inferred.The runtime tests pass, including the 401 regression. Type checking caught the expected signature issue from making digest errors explicit; I’m updating the helper’s error channel to `PlatformError` and then rerunning verification.The focused suite and package typecheck are green. The final formatting check found one mechanical layout issue in the API test; I’m applying the project formatter to the touched files, then I’ll rerun checks and inspect the final patch.Implemented UKN-LRMGB with fail-closed bearer authentication.

Changes:

- Removed the empty-digest fallback in [crypto.ts](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf31y0h_0digormkq5m2/packages/api/src/http/handlers/crypto.ts:25). Digest failures now remain typed effect failures.
- [CycleAuthorization.ts](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf31y0h_0digormkq5m2/packages/api/src/http/middleware/CycleAuthorization.ts:29) logs digest failures and converts them to `false`, producing the standard 401 response.
- Added a focused helper regression test in [crypto.test.ts](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf31y0h_0digormkq5m2/packages/api/test/crypto.test.ts:18).
- Added an HTTP-level regression test in [api.test.ts](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf31y0h_0digormkq5m2/packages/api/test/api.test.ts:708), confirming even the correct bearer token receives 401 when digesting fails.

Verification passed:

- API tests: 4 files, 37 tests
- API typecheck
- API lint
- Touched-file formatting
- `git diff --check`

Repository-wide typecheck and lint also passed. The repository-wide format check remains blocked by 452 pre-existing formatting issues outside the touched files. No commit or push was performed.
